findings.description: The hints for s2 are missing `nablarch-X.X.jar` (Nablarch Application Framework JAR), which is the first entry in the source file table's first column. The other two JARs (`nablarch-tfw` and `nablarch-toolbox`) are represented, but the main Nablarch framework JAR is omitted.
findings.source_evidence: ファイル名列の最初の行: `nablarch-X.X.jar` | Nablarch Application Framework のJARファイル（X.Xの部分はバージョン番号）
